description_for_human: Connect to Jira Cloud to search, create, and manage issues.

functions.name: jira_whoami
functions.description: Return the current Jira user's identity.

functions.name: jira_get_issue
functions.description: Retrieve a single Jira issue by key.

functions.name: jira_add_comment
functions.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue.

functions.name: jira_transition_issue
functions.description: Transition a Jira issue to a new status.
